items.name: skin-base
items.title: Base skin (tunable, no concept)
items.description: Generic, concept-free skin with universal structural dials (border, bevel, elevation, blur, surface opacity, press) — neutral at default = stock shadcn, turn them up to add structure. Scoped to [data-skin="base"].
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/base.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="base" on <html>.  3) Tune --ui-border/-bevel/-elevation/-blur/-surface/-press + --radius.

items.name: skin-xp
items.title: Windows XP skin
items.description: Skeuomorphic Windows XP (Luna) concept skin for shadcn/ui: beveled putty controls, navy title gradient, blue selection. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="xp"].
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/xp.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="xp" on <html>. Components are unchanged.

items.name: skin-brutalist
items.title: Brutalist skin
items.description: Brutalist concept skin: hard black borders, chunky offset shadows, uppercase grotesk, one loud accent. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="brutalist"].
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/brutalist.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="brutalist" on <html>.

items.name: skin-neumorphic
items.title: Neumorphic skin
items.description: Soft-UI concept skin: monochrome surface, depth from paired light/dark shadows, borderless. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="neumorphic"].
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/neumorphic.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="neumorphic" on <html>.

items.name: skin-terminal
items.title: Terminal / TUI skin
items.description: Terminal concept skin: phosphor green-on-black, monospace, [ bracketed ] buttons, CRT scanlines. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="terminal"].
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/terminal.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="terminal" on <html>.

items.name: skin-glass
items.title: Glassmorphism skin
items.description: Glass concept skin: frosted translucent panels, backdrop blur, over a vivid gradient. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="glass"].
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/glass.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="glass" on <html>.

items.name: theme-xp
items.title: Windows XP theme (tokens only)
items.description: The XP token half ONLY — colors, radius 0, Tahoma — expressed as native shadcn cssVars. This is exactly what a tweakcn theme outputs: a flat, square recolor. Pair with skin-xp for the bevels/chrome that tokens can't express.

theme.font-sans: Tahoma, Verdana, Geneva, 'DejaVu Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

items.name: skin-win98
items.title: Windows 98 skin
items.description: Windows 98 concept skin: classic grey 4-edge 3D bevels, navy title gradients, teal desktop. A CSS overlay scoped to [data-skin="win98"] over unmodified shadcn components.
items.docs: 1) @import "./skins/win98.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="win98" on <html>.
